home.hero_title: Find Your Dream Property in Morocco
home.hero_subtitle: Luxury villas, apartments and commercial spaces across Morocco
home.featured_empty_sub: Check back soon for our latest listings.
home.about_p1: LaTour Immo is a leading real estate agency in Morocco, dedicated to helping clients find exceptional properties across the kingdom. With over a decade of experience, we specialize in luxury villas, modern apartments, and premium commercial spaces in Morocco's most sought-after cities.
home.about_p2: Our team of expert agents provides personalized service, guiding you through every step of buying, selling, or renting your perfect property. Trust LaTour Immo to turn your real estate dreams into reality.

about.title: About LaTour Immo
about.subtitle: Your trusted real estate partner in Morocco
about.story_p1: Founded in Casablanca, LaTour Immo was born from a simple belief: buying or selling property in Morocco should be a confident, transparent experience. What started as a small local agency has grown into a trusted name serving clients across Marrakech, Rabat, Tangier, Agadir, and beyond.
about.mission_text: is to connect people with exceptional properties while providing honest guidance at every stage.
about.vision_text: is to become Morocco's most respected real estate brand — known for integrity, local expertise, and a client-first approach that turns every transaction into a lasting partnership.
about.value1_desc: We believe in honest advice, transparent transactions, and putting our clients' interests first in every deal.
about.value2_desc: From property selection to closing, we deliver a premium service experience that exceeds expectations.
about.value3_desc: We build lasting relationships with buyers, sellers, and investors — guiding you at every step of your journey.

evaluation.discover_value: Discover the true market value of your property with a professional evaluation from our expert team — completely free and with no obligation.
evaluation.thank_you_evaluation: Thank you for your trust. Our team will analyze your property and send your evaluation report within 48 hours.
evaluation.step1_desc: Fill out the form with your property details and upload photos. It only takes a few minutes.
evaluation.step2_desc: Our certified valuers review market data, location trends, and your property specifics.
evaluation.step3_desc: Get a detailed, no-obligation valuation report delivered directly to your inbox.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.t1_text: Exceptional service! The LaTour Immo team guided me from A to Z for the sale of my villa. Very professional and responsive.
testimonials.t2_text: Thanks to LaTour Immo, I found a beautiful modern apartment in Kénitra in less than a week. Transparent and smooth process.
testimonials.t3_text: A trusted agency with excellent knowledge of the Moroccan market. I highly recommend for any premium investment.

footer.description: Your trusted partner for luxury real estate in Morocco. We help you find, buy, rent, and sell exceptional properties across the kingdom.
